name: facebook-comment-finder
description: Turn an offer into Facebook signal discovery with page-led and post-led retrieval, ranked goodput, and thread-aware reply angles.

interface.shortDescription: Find real Facebook posts and comments worth engaging now for buyer signal or audience visibility.
interface.longDescription: Turns an offer URL or short offer summary into Facebook signal discovery, uses page-led and post-led retrieval, filters praise spam and parasocial noise, keeps only engage-now threads, and drafts thread-aware reply angles when useful.
defaultPrompt: Find Facebook signal for this offer and show the best posts and comments.
Turn this offer into Facebook seed pages, findings, and reply angles.
Find real Facebook conversations where this ICP is exposing the problem or the audience.
